zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emily Fitzgerald於1316年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼時，她的父親Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond23歲，母親Katharine de Burgh22歲。她和Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1372年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Emily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emily Fitzgerald was born in 1316, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland, her father, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, was 23 and her mother, Katharine de Burgh, was 22. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. She died in 1372, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emily Fitzgerald est née en 1316, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande, son père, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Katharine de Burgh, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. Elle est décédée en 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emily Fitzgerald 1316 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond 23 und ihre Mutter Katharine de Burgh 22. Sie hatte mit Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1372 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emily Fitzgerald è nata il nel 1316 nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, sua padre, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Katharine de Burgh, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. Morì nel 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emily Fitzgeraldが1316年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイで生まれた時，父Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmondは23歳，母Katharine de Burghは22歳であった。彼女はGerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1372年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emily Fitzgerald(이)가 1316년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharine de Burgh(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emily Fitzgerald nasceu em 1316, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, seu pai, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Katharine de Burgh, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. Ela faleceu em 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emily Fitzgerald родилась в 1316 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katharine de Burgh, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. Она умерла в 1372 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Emily Fitzgerald nació en 1316, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, su papá, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Katharine de Burgh, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Gerald Lord Of Drumrany Dillon. Murió en 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
